scripts.dev: [ -d venv ] && venv/bin/python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000 || python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.migrate: [ -d venv ] && venv/bin/python manage.py migrate || (echo 'No venv/ found. Run: python3 -m venv venv && pip install -r requirements.txt' && false)
scripts.migrate:check: [ -d venv ] && venv/bin/python manage.py showmigrations || (echo 'No venv/ found. Run: python3 -m venv venv && pip install -r requirements.txt' && false)
scripts.makemigrations: [ -d venv ] && venv/bin/python manage.py makemigrations || (echo 'No venv/ found. Run: python3 -m venv venv && pip install -r requirements.txt' && false)
scripts.seed: [ -d venv ] && venv/bin/python manage.py seed_data || (echo 'No venv/ found. Run: python3 -m venv venv && pip install -r requirements.txt' && false)
